records.ety: [L. effervescere; ex + fervescere to begin boiling, incho., fr. fervere to boil. See Fervent.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Effervesced (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Effervescing (?).]

defs: To be in a state of natural ebullition; to bubble and hiss, as fermenting liquors, or any fluid, when some part escapes in a gaseous form.
To exhibit, in lively natural expression, feelings that can not be repressed or concealed; as, to effervesce with joy or merriment.
